'''ât-y-p''' ('''katayap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mad|mad]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mad|mad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-y-p
|-
! Lemma
| katayap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitayap|thitayap]] || [[word:jitayap|jitayap]] || [[word:shitayap|shitayap]] || [[word:kitayap|kitayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutayap|thuthutayap]] || [[word:jujutayap|jujutayap]] || [[word:shushutayap|shushutayap]] || [[word:kukutayap|kukutayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutayap|thutayap]] || [[word:jutayap|jutayap]] || [[word:shutayap|shutayap]] || [[word:kutayap|kutayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutayap|thutayap]] || [[word:jutayap|jutayap]] || [[word:shutayap|shutayap]] || [[word:kutayap|kutayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetayap|thetayap]] || [[word:jetayap|jetayap]] || [[word:shetayap|shetayap]] || [[word:ketayap|ketayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotayap|thothotayap]] || [[word:jojotayap|jojotayap]] || [[word:shoshotayap|shoshotayap]] || [[word:kokotayap|kokotayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotayap|thotayap]] || [[word:jotayap|jotayap]] || [[word:shotayap|shotayap]] || [[word:kotayap|kotayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotayap|thotayap]] || [[word:jotayap|jotayap]] || [[word:shotayap|shotayap]] || [[word:kotayap|kotayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtayap|thĂŠtayap]] || [[word:jĂŠtayap|jĂŠtayap]] || [[word:shĂŠtayap|shĂŠtayap]] || [[word:kĂŠtayap|kĂŠtayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatayap|thathatayap]] || [[word:jajatayap|jajatayap]] || [[word:shashatayap|shashatayap]] || [[word:kakatayap|kakatayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatayap|thatayap]] || [[word:jatayap|jatayap]] || [[word:shatayap|shatayap]] || [[word:katayap|katayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatayap|thatayap]] || [[word:jatayap|jatayap]] || [[word:shatayap|shatayap]] || [[word:katayap|katayap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatayap|shatayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatayap|goshatayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatayap|gokishatayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatayapnĂŒ|shatayapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatayapnknĂŒ|goshatayapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatayapnĂŒ|gokishatayapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatayapshĂ«|shatayapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatayapnkshĂ«|goshatayapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatayapshĂ«|gokishatayapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatayapro|shatayapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatayapnkro|goshatayapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatayapro|gokishatayapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatayapmu|shatayapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatayapnkmu|goshatayapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatayapmu|gokishatayapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatayapsher|shatayapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatayapnksher|goshatayapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatayapsher|gokishatayapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatayapng|shatayapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatayapnkng|goshatayapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatayapng|gokishatayapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatayapya|shatayapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatayapnkya|goshatayapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatayapya|gokishatayapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatayapyam|shatayapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatayapnkyam|goshatayapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatayapyam|gokishatayapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatayapnĂŒshĂ«|shatayapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatayapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatayapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatayapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatayapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatayapnĂŒro|shatayapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatayapnknĂŒro|goshatayapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatayapnĂŒro|gokishatayapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatayapnĂŒmu|shatayapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatayapnknĂŒmu|goshatayapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatayapnĂŒmu|gokishatayapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatayapshĂ«nĂŒ|shatayapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatayapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatayapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatayapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatayapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatayapshĂ«ro|shatayapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatayapnkshĂ«ro|goshatayapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatayapshĂ«ro|gokishatayapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatayapshĂ«mu|shatayapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatayapnkshĂ«mu|goshatayapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatayapshĂ«mu|gokishatayapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatayapronĂŒ|shatayapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatayapnkronĂŒ|goshatayapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatayapronĂŒ|gokishatayapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatayaproshĂ«|shatayaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatayapnkroshĂ«|goshatayapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatayaproshĂ«|gokishatayaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatayapromu|shatayapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatayapnkromu|goshatayapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatayapromu|gokishatayapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatayapmunĂŒ|shatayapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatayapnkmunĂŒ|goshatayapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatayapmunĂŒ|gokishatayapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatayapmushĂ«|shatayapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatayapnkmushĂ«|goshatayapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatayapmushĂ«|gokishatayapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatayapmuro|shatayapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatayapnkmuro|goshatayapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatayapmuro|gokishatayapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
